clauses.title: Insurance and Indemnification
clauses._source_text_exact: 7.1 Tenant shall maintain commercial general liability insurance with limits of not less than $2,000,000 per occurrence, naming Landlord as an additional insured, and shall indemnify Landlord against claims arising from Tenant's use of the Premises, except to the extent caused by Landlord's negligence.

section_path: 7. INSURANCE AND INDEMNIFICATION

7.1 Tenant shall maintain commercial general liability insurance with limits of not less than $2,000,000 per occurrence, naming Landlord as an additional insured, and shall indemnify Landlord against claims arising from Tenant's use of the Premises, except to the extent caused by Landlord's negligence.
